hero.name: Divya Shree P
hero.tagline: Crafting {immersive web experiences} through {elegant design} and {clean code}
hero.description: Frontend Developer with 3+ years of experience building responsive, user-centric web applications. Specialized in translating Figma designs into scalable React.js components while maintaining pixel-perfect precision and optimal performance.

about.heading: About Me
paragraphs: I am a {Frontend Developer} with over {3+ years of experience} designing and implementing responsive web interfaces. My professional journey began in {UI/UX design}, which gave me a unique perspective on creating intuitive user experiences. This foundation allows me to bridge the gap between design and development effortlessly.

Throughout my career, I have specialized in building {interactive dashboards}, {responsive layouts}, and {reusable UI component libraries}. My expertise spans across {React.js}, {JavaScript (ES6+)}, {HTML5}, and {CSS3}, with a strong emphasis on component-based architecture and modern UI development practices.

What sets me apart is my ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams including designers, backend developers, and product managers. I thrive in {Agile environments} and am passionate about delivering high-quality user interfaces that balance aesthetics with functionality.

I am continuously exploring new technologies and best practices to enhance my craft. My goal is to contribute to impactful projects where I can leverage my skills in frontend development and UI/UX design to create meaningful digital experiences.

jobs.title: UI/UX Designer - Frontend Development
highlights: Designed intuitive user interfaces and interaction flows for gaming and entertainment platforms using Figma and Adobe XD, resulting in improved user engagement.
Converted design prototypes into responsive, pixel-perfect web interfaces using HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and Bootstrap.
Developed and maintained a comprehensive UI component library for dashboards and internal tools, reducing development time by 40%.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to integrate UI components into production systems, ensuring seamless functionality and visual consistency.
Enhanced usability and accessibility across dashboard interfaces handling large datasets, improving user satisfaction scores by 25%.
Established and maintained UI design system guidelines, ensuring consistent product interfaces across all digital properties.
Actively participated in Agile/Scrum development cycles, contributing to sprint planning, daily stand-ups, and retrospectives.
Mentored junior developers on frontend best practices and modern UI architecture principles.
